name: Bennigan's Meat Loaf
recipeIngredient: 7 1/2 ounces Yellow or red onions, diced
3/8 cup Tomato sauce combined with brown sugar
recipeInstructions:
1. Dice the onions and green pepper.
2. In a mixing bowl, whisk the eggs well.
3. Combine all ingredients except the tomato sauce for brushing into the bowl and mix well.
4. Divide the mixture into 3 or 4 loaf pans.
5. Preheat the oven to 350°F (175°C).
6. Bake for one hour.
7. 10 minutes before the bake time is up, brush each loaf with the tomato sauce mixture.
8. Alternatively, shape the meat mixture into a crock-pot size and cook all day.
